mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement (title, content, publisher_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{publisherId})
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.real_name AS publisher_name FROM announcement a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.publisher_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
SELECT a.*, u.real_name AS publisher_name FROM announcement a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.publisher_id = u.id ORDER BY a.publish_time DESC
SELECT a.*, u.real_name AS publisher_name FROM announcement a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.publisher_id = u.id ORDER BY a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
